jobs.basic_qualifications:
Knowledge of IT hardware (desktops, laptops, servers) and its configurations.
Basic IT troubleshooting experience and/or knowledge.
This position has a physical component requiring the ability to lift & rack equipment using our lifting equipment.
Candidates must possess a valid driver’s license and their own vehicle to travel between sites.
jobs.description:
Are you excited about Server and Networking Technology and want to work in the Largest Data Centers in the World? If so, we want to meet you and help grow your technical skills! At Amazon, career progression is part of our environment. We want you to progress, so come and work for the world’s most Customer-centric Company.

You will work with the world’s largest computing infrastructure. Your work involves some periods' independence from your team. You will learn the daily operations of a large data center. You will be working and troubleshooting hands on with servers and network equipment.

You will interact with other teams like logistics, networking, security, and etc in order to get the job done. There is never a dull moment as each day presents itself with different challenges. Work with multiple teams (DC operations, DC Engineering, Logistics, Security and Projects etc.)

Data Center Operations designs, installs and maintains the world’s largest Computing Infrastructure. Our scope of work includes systems, repairing, dealing with issues, handling and tracking parts and assisting in Data Center maintenance. Amazon Data Centers are large-scale high-density centers where you will help change the face of Technology in the region.

We are looking for candidates to commit to a 6-month contract and we are committed to provide coaching and periodic assessments to help develop your skills.

If successful after the 6 month period you might be interviewed to join the Amazon family full-time. For more info you can visit http://infrastructure.aws.

Some of the key responsibilities you will undertake are:
- Perform diagnostics and troubleshoot all hardware and related problems
- Perform basic level OS troubleshooting
- Perform basic level configuration troubleshooting
- Perform replacement of our parts of and devices
- Perform storage media (HDD, SSD etc.) sanitization and destruction tasks
- Maintain a high level of system reliability by prioritizing resolution of trouble tickets efficiently
- Follow DC operations, Logistics, Security and Safety related processes and guidelines
- Practice and enforce Amazons Security and Safety best practices

- ミッションクリティカルな設備の運用と保守に関する 2 年以上の関連実務経験（例: 24 時間稼働の工場、変電所、病院など）

jobs.description:
AWS Infrastructure Services はすべての AWS グローバルインフラストラクチャの設計、計画、提供、運用を担当しています。私たちは、クラウドを稼働させ続ける人々です。すべての AWS データセンターとお客様がイノベーションに継続的にアクセスできるようにするすべてのサーバー、ストレージ、ネットワーク、電源、冷却設備をサポートしています。私たちはサプライチェーンに影響を与える数千もの要因を考慮しながら、最も困難な課題に取り組んでいます。そして私たちと共に支援したいと考える優秀な人材を探しています。

ソフトウェア、ハードウェア、ネットワークエンジニア、サプライチェーンスペシャリスト、セキュリティエキスパート、オペレーションマネージャー、その他の重要な役割を担う多様なチームに参加していただきます。AWS 全体の人々と協力して、お客様に最低コストで無限の容量を提供しながら、安全性とセキュリティの最高基準を提供できるよう支援していただきます。そして、大胆なアイデアを歓迎し、それを完成まで自分のものとして進める力を与える包括的な文化を体験していただけます。

Data Center Operationsチームは AWS のバックボーンであり、急速に成長する AWS ビジネスとお客様を 24 時間 365 日サポートしています。私たちは AWS の物理インフラストラクチャを維持し、安全性、セキュリティ、可用性、生産性、容量、効率性、コストの分野における運用パフォーマンスの基準を確保することに取り組んでいます。

主な職務内容

Facility Engineer - Data Center Engineering Operations (DCEO) の役割は、大規模で高密度のデータセンターにおいて、施設（電気/機械システム、制御/消火システムなど）の展開、運用、保守、および関連プロジェクトの管理を担当します。

日常業務では、以下の業務に携わります:

建物システムの点検と監視、および施設の問題のトラブルシューティング

運用効率の改善とエネルギー削減

ベンダーやパートナーとの定期メンテナンスと修理の計画と実施。これには、ブレーカー操作、機械/電気設備操作などの重要な施設運用が含まれます

新規キャパシティ設置前の電気冷却容量の確認

新規データセンター建設および既存データセンター拡張の設計レビュー

プロジェクトチームメンバーと協力して建設とテストをサポート

- 勤務時間

柔軟な勤務体制:

通常営業日は 9:00〜18:00 の間で実働 8 時間

勤務時間は、その日および週の業務に応じて相談・調整可能

通常勤務時間外のオンコール業務があり、全チームメンバーで週単位でローテーション

*注: ビジネス状況によっては、この役割でシフト勤務が必要になる場合があります。シフト勤務の詳細については、面接時に説明します。

About the team
多様な経験

AWS は多様な経験を重視しています。職務内容に記載されているすべての資格やスキルを満たしていなくても、応募することをお勧めします。キャリアが始まったばかりの場合、従来の道を歩んでいない場合、または関連しない経験がある場合でも、応募をためらわないでください。

なぜ AWS なのか?

Amazon Web Services (AWS) は、世界で最も包括的で広く採用されているクラウドプラットフォームです。私たちはクラウドコンピューティングのパイオニアであり、イノベーションを止めることはありません。だからこそ、最も成功しているスタートアップから Global 500 企業まで、幅広いお客様が当社の堅牢な製品・サービスを信頼し、ビジネスを推進しています。

包括的なチーム文化

AWS では、学び、好奇心を持つことが私たちの本質です。従業員主導のアフィニティグループは、私たちが自分たちの違いを誇りに思える包括的な文化を育んでいます。Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) や AmazeCon (ジェンダーダイバーシティ) カンファレンスを含む継続的なイベントや学習体験は、私たちが独自性を受け入れることを決して止めないよう刺激を与えてくれます。

メンターシップとキャリア成長

私たちは、地球上で最高の雇用主になるために、継続的にパフォーマンスバーを引き上げています。だからこそ、ここには、より多角的な専門家に成長するのに役立つ、無限の知識共有、メンターシップ、その他のキャリア向上リソースがあります。

ワークライフバランス

私たちはワークライフハーモニーを重視しています。仕事での成功は、家庭での犠牲を伴うべきではありません。だからこそ、柔軟な勤務時間と勤務体制が私たちの文化の一部となっています。職場と家庭でサポートされていると感じるとき、クラウドで達成できないことは何もありません。
jobs.description_short: AWS Infrastructure Services はすべての AWS グローバルインフラストラクチャの設計、計画、提供、運用を担当しています。私たちは、クラウドを稼働させ続ける人々です。すべての AWS データセンターとお客様がイノベーションに継続的にアクセスできるようにするすべてのサーバー、ストレージ、ネットワーク、電源、冷却設備をサポートしています。私たちはサプライチェーンに影響を与える数千もの要因を考慮しながら、最も困難な課題に取り組んでいます。そして私たちと共に支援したいと考える優秀な人材を探しています。
jobs.preferred_qualifications:
- データセンターに関連する資格（CDCP、CDCS、CDCE、ASHRAE など）、またはデータセンター管理のための資格（第二種または第三種電気主任技術者、エネルギー管理士、第 4 類危険物取扱者、冷凍機械責任者、第二種電気工事士）
- プロジェクト管理資格（PMP、Prince2、ITILv2、BICSI）
- 電気システムに関する高度な理解力（変電所の電源供給システム、変圧器、スイッチギア、VFI クラス UPS、DRUPS、PDU、ATS、STS、SLA または VRLA バッテリーおよび関連システム、ディーゼル/ガスタービン発電機に関連する燃料システム、サージ制御回路、アクティブ高調波フィルター、バッテリー監視システム、分岐回路監視システム、SCADA システム）
- 機械システムに関する高度な理解力（CRAC/CRAH、AHU、チラー、冷却塔、貯蔵タンク、熱交換器、配管システム、ポンプ、バルブ、ダクトシステム、ファン、ダンパー、火災検知・消火システム、排水システム、ビル監視システム、自動制御システム）
- 英語の流暢さ - TOEIC スコア 800 以上または同等

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- 3+ years of professional non-internship marketing experience
- Experience using data and metrics to drive improvements
- Experience with Excel or Tableau (data manipulation, macros, charts and pivot tables)
- Experience managing or working within cross-functional marketing and creative teams
- Experience with A/B Testing or Multi-Variate Testing or both
jobs.description:
An exciting opportunity which requires a talented marketeer to help Amazon Prime Video scale across India and South East Asia markets segments. Your mission is to drive growth through strategic storefront management across business lines, retail integration (x-site), and sports merchandising initiatives in the region. This role requires a data-driven marketer who can turn insights into actionable strategies to drive strong engagement outcomes while working with multiple stakeholders across different regions.
This role requires strong business and customer first acumen and offers exposure to multiple regional stakeholders within Amazon Prime Video. As this function has direct impact to business outcomes, it is a perfect fit for an ambitious, strategic, self-starter with a keen understanding of the customer funnel and who's particularly energized to accelerate growth and looking for new areas to learn and scale.
The candidate should be an experienced marketer with deep customer marketing knowledge, and experience driving conversion across different market contexts. Candidates will have experience working cross-functionally across internal teams, as well as an aptitude for data analysis. A mind for innovation, thinking big, and learning through testing is highly valued. This role will be based out of Mumbai, working closely with teams across IN & SEA region.

Key job responsibilities
This is an individual contributor role. Sharp analytical skills, high ownership and customer obsession, and proven ability to prioritize ruthlessly to achieve results will be critical to succeed in this role.
- Drive Customer Engagement across multiple regions: Drive and support customer engagement metrics across different market segments, understanding, analyzing and reporting them on a regular cadence (weekly, monthly, annually) to respective country leadership teams, taking actions to increase engagement, and influencing others where required.
- Audit and update existing data pipelines in collaboration with the Business Intelligence and Tech teams to ensure the highest level of data quality. Define and run tests, including A/B experiments to test new features and/or inform new product development
- Manage X-site Integration: Drive strategic placement and optimization of Prime Video content across Amazon retail websites, ensuring maximum visibility and conversion from retail to video streaming services
- Plan for Regional Success: Execute and optimize customer-driven storefront strategies for each market segment, aimed at increasing engagement and conversions, leveraging personalization, global tools and manual overrides
- Optimize for Regional Performance: Execute market-specific strategies through systematic programming and experimentation. Utilize regional data to build operating plans that maximize conversions daily across different market segments
- Influence Global Product: Work closely with Global Storefront Product teams to implement and optimize solutions and performance in the region. Contribute to and manage experiments from a regional perspective.
- Stakeholder Management: Collaborate across multiple regional teams to provide visibility for entertainment content, sports events, and x-site initiatives. Support and execute in prioritizing levers across market segments


About the team
The O&O Team is a close-knit collaborative team working across multiple regions with strong aptitude for data and ability to manage complex tasks. This team takes full ownership of customer engagement which requires a solid grasp of key engagement metrics and a track record of high performance across different market segments

jobs.basic_qualifications: - 2+ years of program or project management experience
jobs.description:
Love music? Want to build customer-facing products that touch the lives of millions of people? Come join Amazon Music where we are reinventing how people discover and experience music and culture within a community of passionate fans. Amazon Music is an immersive audio entertainment service that deepens connections between fans, artists, and creators. From personalized music playlists to exclusive podcasts, concert livestreams to artist merch, Amazon Music is innovating at some of the most exciting intersections of music and culture. We offer experiences that serve all listeners with our different tiers of service: Prime members get access to all the music in shuffle mode, and top ad-free podcasts, included with their membership; customers can upgrade to Amazon Music Unlimited for unlimited, on-demand access to 100 million songs, including millions in HD, Ultra HD, and spatial audio; and anyone can listen for free by downloading the Amazon Music app or via Alexa-enabled devices. Join us for the opportunity to influence how Amazon Music engages fans, artists, and creators on a global scale. Learn more at https://www.amazon.com/music.

We are looking for a Product Operations Manager to join the Amazon Music Product Operations team in Bangalore. In this role you will be the bridge between customers and the Amazon Music product teams across key areas. You will ensure product roadmaps meet the most critical needs of our customers and effectively address quality issues. A successful candidate will be analytical and detail oriented, capable of distilling customer insights from a broad and complex set of data. You are a problem solver that can effectively manage ambiguity, capable of working cross functionality to deliver results. You are comfortable with technically complex subject matter and are able to communicate effectively on technical subjects.

Key job responsibilities
• Develop deep product and technical subject matter expertise in key areas of the Amazon Music service
• Monitor customer feedback channels and analyze and synthesize data to provide actionable insights for product teams to inform product planning
• Use AI and automated tools to optimize efficiency and improve the quality of outputs
• Work cross-functionally across product, engineering, design, QA and BI stakeholders to ensure customer issues are routed to the correct teams and track progress towards addressing them along with other key quality metrics
• Maintain and help groom backlogs of quality related features and bug fixes
• Support product teams launching new features and experiments by driving dogfooding and beta testing, aggregating feedback and reporting results
• Look for and identify opportunities to streamline and standardize feedback gathering and analysis processes.

- 5+ years of professional non-internship marketing experience
- Experience in marketing across B2B, or E-comm, or retail or tech sectors
jobs.description:
Over the past 20 years, Amazon has reinvented on behalf of customers and has become the largest internet retailer and marketplace in the world with over $74 billion in revenue globally. Through our entrepreneurial culture, Amazon has developed new technologies and products (like Echo) and, enterprise services (like Amazon Web Services). Amazon is now reinventing on behalf of the business customer and focused on building the largest and most innovative Business-to-Business (B2B) business in the world, and we are recruiting to make this vision a reality.

B2B represents an incredible opportunity to address a vast new market segment and customer base and is an area of high interest for Amazon. We are focused on building solutions that enable B2B customers to find, research, and buy products and services from a vast selection, across multiple devices, marketplaces and regions. Our customers include individual professionals, small businesses to large institutions (and everything in between). Our B2B customers have different needs than the traditional Amazon customer so we are reinventing everything from how we display our selection, price our products, and provide the right customer experience.


Key job responsibilities
Are you excited by the challenge and sense of ownership that comes from leading programs and projects at Amazon scale? Do you enjoy working in an entrepreneurial environment, solving complex operations, business, marketing and technical problems by delivering innovative solutions? If so, then you are at the right place.
- Build and execute retention programs to reduce customer churn. Track performance and manage output efficiently
- Build and Execute GTM for key customer cohorts
- Forecast and report business growth and other key metrics, including tracking actual progress toward forecasts.
- Present and lead conversations about business issues, solutions, and strategy to senior leaders
- Researching and conducting market analysis for Amazon customers
- Develop targeted messages based on the key value propositions and use cases.
- Work with the product managers to define necessary product/service improvements and new areas for innovation.

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- Bachelor's degree
- Speak, write, and read fluently in English
jobs.description:
As part of the AWS Applied AI Solutions organization, we have a vision to provide business applications, leveraging Amazon’s unique experience and expertise, that are used by millions of companies worldwide to manage day-to-day operations. We will accomplish this by accelerating our customers’ businesses through delivery of intuitive and differentiated technology solutions that solve enduring business challenges. We blend vision with curiosity and Amazon’s real-world experience to build opinionated, turnkey solutions. Where customers prefer to buy over build, we become their trusted partner with solutions that are no-brainers to buy and easy to use.

Inclusive Team Culture
AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.

Amazon Physical Stores is more start-up than big-company, a group of entrepreneurial, perceptive, and creative leaders with innovation at our core. We’re pushing the state of the art in helping customers shop in engaging, fast, and safe ways. To date we’ve created stores that let you use an app to enter, take what you want from our fresh selection, and go (Amazon Go); a smart shopping cart that uses computer vision algorithms and sensor fusion to let you skip the checkout line (Amazon Dash Cart); and contactless services that let you pay, enter or identify yourself (Amazon One). CXQO Machine Learning Data Operations associates support the backend non-technical operation of Amazon Go Stores.

Key job responsibilities
• Perform data collection tasks related to an Amazon device, application, or service.
• Execute tasks assigned to you on a daily basis by adhering to Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and predefined guidelines.
• Participate in process improvement to increase the quality, efficiency, and accuracy of your teams’ processes.
• Partner with your team manager when your work is delayed or blocked due to technical issues.
• Report issues with tools and software to the development team when necessary.
• Maintain strict confidentiality and follow all applicable Amazon policies for securing confidential information.


About the team
Diverse Experiences
Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.

Why AWS
Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
Work/Life Balance
We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
Inclusive Team Culture
Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (diversity) conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.
Mentorship and Career Growth
We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.

jobs.description:
The Amazon Consumables Private Label team is creating a global portfolio of consumables products to meet customers' daily needs. We are seeking a highly motivated Senior Category Manager with a healthy obsession for the rapidly evolving world of consumer packaged goods, online delivery, and product innovation to join our team and help us change the everyday lives of our global customers. The Category Manager will work across our portfolio to identify/launch new private brand selection opportunities on .com and drive improvements in our P&L.

You are passionate about identifying a compelling, profitable assortment that will delight our customers. You have experience analyzing data, driving cost out of the supply chain, and developing new businesses. You enjoy building profitable businesses and getting into the details of a P&L. You have an amazing level of intellectual curiosity, strong financial acumen, a high degree of ownership and integrity, and a high attention to detail. You are an independent self-starter who thrives in connecting people and ideas and have a strong entrepreneurial drive. You excel at communication and are comfortable with playing a lead role in a highly visible organization. You coordinate with cross-functional teams to drive growth and process improvement for your business.

Key job responsibilities
The Category Manager’s primary responsibilities will include working across private brand stakeholders throughout WW Consumables and Private Brands to:

Evaluate the online and offline assortment across channels and determine the right selection (based on product types, attributes, brands) for us to assort and scale on .com based on market trends and customer needs analysis

Weekly and monthly tracking of category P&Ls to monitor profitability goals and diving deep where needed to drive continuous improvement.
Partner closely with supply chain to drive scalable process development, operational planning (e.g. safety stock, cross-channel allocation strategy, forecast consolidation etc.) and understanding of comprehensive financial analysis to support forecasting/inventory investments.
Influence executive decision-makers, helping them to understand the brand, desired product positioning, key points of difference, and target customer.
Collaborate with other members of the Consumables Private Label team including Commercialization, Pricing, and Instock Management.
Partner closely with cross functional teams including the retail category teams, marketing, product development, legal, product compliance, social responsibility, finance, and transportation to deliver on net revenue and customer satisfaction.
Develop a thorough understanding of the market segment, seasonality and global trends/events, and continually monitoring competitor efforts.

This is a full-time position that may require travel, up to 5% of the time over the course of the year to domestic or international Amazon locations.

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- * 日本語：ネイティブまたはC1レベル以上の流暢さ
- * 機械学習/データラベリング業務の経験
- * 優れた分析力と問題解決能力
- * 細部への高い注意力
- * ビジネス日本語での優れたコミュニケーション能力
- * 品質管理ツールおよびシステムの使用経験
- * 社内ガイドラインを厳格に遵守できる能力
- * データアノテーションと品質メトリクスに関する理解
- * Excelおよびデータ分析ツールへの理解
- * チームとして周りと協力的、効果的に働ける能力
- * 優先順位や業務量の変化への適応力
jobs.description:
AGI-DSチームで、細部にまで注意を払える日本語の品質監査担当者を募集しています。品質監査担当者(Quality Auditor)として、グローバルなData Associateネットワーク内で体系的な品質評価を実施し、自動化された品質測定システムの手動レビューと検証を行っていただきます。本ポジションは、AI開発とトレーニングにおける高水準のデータ品質を維持するために不可欠な役割です。

Key job responsibilities
* Data Associateが納品した個別のワークフローおよび成果物に対する品質監査の実施
* 同じ拠点に配置されているData Associateへのコーチングとキャリブレーションによるパフォーマンス向上支援
* Data Associateレベルの品質に関する詳細な分析と、問題の根本原因の特定
* 自動化された品質測定システムを検証するための手動レビューの実施
* 品質調査結果の正確かつ効率的な文書化と報告
* 深堀り調査やエスカレーション対応のための監査実施
* 品質基準と手順の厳格な遵守
* Quality Audit Specialistと緊密に連携し、プロセス改善とベストプラクティスの実装
* 品質保証チーム内での継続的改善活動への貢献

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- Experience in mechanical and electrical integration or assembly
- Can carry/lift up to 50 lbs, stand/walk during shifts lasting up to 12 hours, and frequently push, pull, squat, bend and reach
- Travel up to 25% of the time
- Experience with common business applications and tools (i.e. Microsoft Office, ie. Word, Excel, etc.)
jobs.description:
Here at Amazon, we embrace our differences. We are committed to furthering our culture of diversity and inclusion of our teams within the organization.
How do you get items to customers quickly, cost-effectively, and—most importantly—safely, in less than an hour? And how do you do it in a way that can scale? Our teams of hundreds of scientists, engineers, aerospace professionals, and futurists have been working hard to do just that! We are delivering to customers, and are excited for what’s to come. Check out more information about Prime Air on the About Amazon blog (https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/transportation/amazon-prime-air-delivery-drone-reveal-photos)
If you are seeking an iterative environment where you can drive innovation, apply state-of-the-art technologies to solve real world delivery challenges, and provide benefits to customers, Prime Air is the place for you. Come work on the Amazon Prime Air Team!

Prime Air is seeking a Repair Technician who combines technical skills with a passion for maintaining machinery and aircraft. This person will be responsible for drone maintenance and routine service, ensuring the aircraft conforms to design, and that vehicles are in safe operating condition. This candidate is expected to work closely with engineering, flight operations, and other Prime Air teams to deliver on their assigned responsibilities. This individual should possess strong analytical skills, be a self-starter, and work well independently.

Key job responsibilities
• Drive time-based and condition-based maintenance activities
• Show understanding of fleet performance metrics
• Verify adherence to FAA regulations and Prime Air directives and processes
• Manage fleet spare parts and inventory
• Demonstrate proactive safety mindset in ambiguous situations
• Follow detailed instructions outlined in technical manuals

This role requires the ability to carry/lift up to 50 lbs, stand / walk during shifts lasting up to 12 hours, and be able to frequently push, pull, squat, bend and reach.

This role requires the ability to work any shift, including nights, weekends, and holidays

This role requires travel, up to 25% of the time.

Export Control License
This position may require a deemed export control license for compliance with applicable laws and regulations. Placement is contingent on Amazon’s ability to apply for and obtain an export control license on your behalf.

This position may be subject to Department of Transportation (DOT) drug and alcohol testing if conducting safety sensitive functions as defined by the FAA. Federal law also requires Amazon to determine an applicant's DOT drug and/or alcohol testing history prior to hiring him/her into a position that would require them to conduct safety sensitive functions as defined by the FAA.

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers.
